# UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.center

**Case**

The text has centered alignment.

## Declaration

```swift
case center
```

## Text alignment

- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.justified**: The text has justified alignment.
- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.natural**: The text uses the default alignment that the system associates with the current localization of the app.

items.description: The text uses the default alignment that the system associates with the current localization of the app.
